title: WA8 0SJ, Blue Phoenix Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3631WQ/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Blue Phoenix Limited   Installation name: Widnes IBA Processing Facility   Permit number: EPR/DP3631WQ/V004   "
